posts.author: Larryr20 (Larry Rabinowitz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hi, I see that Monday.com is constantly making updates which is great but many times, we run into them by accident. For example, there is a new feature where we can set automation importance. Even though this is a relatively minor feature in our eyes, I cant help but think we are missing others. Is there a single place where we can see ALL the changes/fixes/features that are added to Monday.com? In other systems, there are monthly reports that list fixes/enhancements/features in one document. Does Monday.com have anything like this without doing a search for these things?

What are you trying to achieve

Trying to find an easy place to see all the new features and enhancements in Monday.com
